samples.xml_description:
<module id="multi_pipe_8bit">
    <description>Unsigned 8-bit multiplier implemented using pipelined processing.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal used for synchronous operation.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal. Defined as 0 for chip reset and 1 for reset signal inactive.</input>
        <input id="mul_en_in">Input enable signal that controls the multiplication operation.</input>
        <input id="mul_a" width_description="[7:0]">Multiplicand input signal with a data width of 8 bits.</input>
        <input id="mul_b" width_description="[7:0]">Multiplier input signal with a data width of 8 bits.</input>
        <output id="mul_en_out">Output enable signal indicating if the multiplication operation is enabled.</output>
        <output id="mul_out" width_description="[15:0]">Product output signal with a data width of 16 bits.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <constant name="IDLE">0</constant>
        <constant name="STAGE1">1</constant>
        <constant name="STAGE2">2</constant>
        <constant name="STAGE3">3</constant>
        <constant name="STAGE4">4</constant>
        <constant name="STAGE5">5</constant>
        <constant name="STAGE6">6</constant>
        <constant name="STAGE7">7</constant>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="combinational_logic">
        <assign id="mul_en_out">mul_en_out_reg[3]</assign>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        // Register declarations
        reg [3:0] mul_en_out_reg;
        reg [7:0] mul_a_reg;
        reg [7:0] mul_b_reg;
        reg [15:0] sum [0:7];
        reg [15:0] mul_out_reg;
        
        // Assigning inputs to registers
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (~rst_n) begin
                mul_en_out_reg <= 4'b0;
            end else begin
                mul_en_out_reg <= {mul_en_out_reg[2:0], mul_en_in};
            end
        end
        
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (~rst_n) begin
                mul_a_reg <= 8'b0;
                mul_b_reg <= 8'b0;
            end else if (mul_en_out_reg[0]) begin
                mul_a_reg <= mul_a;
                mul_b_reg <= mul_b;
            end
        end
        
        // Generating partial products
        wire [7:0] temp[0:7];
        genvar i;
        generate
            for (i = 0; i < 8; i=i+1) begin : pp_gen
                assign temp[i] = (mul_b_reg[i] == 1'b1) ? (mul_a_reg >> i) : 8'b0;
            end
        endgenerate
        
        // Calculating partial sums
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (~rst_n) begin
                sum[0] <= 16'b0;
                sum[1] <= 16'b0;
                sum[2] <= 16'b0;
                sum[3] <= 16'b0;
                sum[4] <= 16'b0;
                sum[5] <= 16'b0;
                sum[6] <= 16'b0;
                sum[7] <= 16'b0;
            end else begin
                sum[0] <= temp[0];
                sum[1] <= sum[0] + temp[1];
                sum[2] <= sum[1] + temp[2];
                sum[3] <= sum[2] + temp[3];
                sum[4] <= sum[3] + temp[4];
                sum[5] <= sum[4] + temp[5];
                sum[6] <= sum[5] + temp[6];
                sum[7] <= sum[6] + temp[7];
            end
        end
        
        // Final product calculation
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (~rst_n) begin
                mul_out_reg <= 16'b0;
            end else begin
                mul_out_reg <= sum[0] + sum[1] + sum[2] + sum[3] + sum[4] + sum[5] + sum[6] + sum[7];
            end
        end
        
        // Assigning outputs
        assign mul_out = (mul_en_out_reg[3]) ? mul_out_reg : 16'b0;
    </implementation>
</module>
